banner_matchers.value:
^SIP/2\.0 200 OK
Via: SIP/2\.0/TCP nm;branch=foo
To: <sip:nm2@nm2>;tag=\w+
From: <sip:nm@nm>;tag=root
Call-ID: 50000
CSeq: 42 OPTIONS
Allow: INVITE,ACK,CANCEL,BYE,OPTIONS,REFER,NOTIFY
Content-Type: application/sdp
Content-Length: \d+

v=0
o=- \d+ \d+ IN IP4 [\d.]+
s=-
c=IN IP4 [\d.]+
t=0 0
m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 18 4 3 8 0 101
a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
$
